warnings: Automated v0.1 uses public RSS sources with URLs for reliability; Yahoo Scout browser collection remains a separately documented POC path.

items.headline: Ex-Kansas player charged with attempted murder
items.detail: Lagerald Vick, a member of the Kansas Jayhawks' Final Four basketball team in 2018, has been charged with attempted first-degree murder in Tennessee.

items.headline: Sources: Brown HC Martin becomes U-M assistant
items.detail: Mike Martin, the winningest basketball coach at Brown, is leaving the Bears to become an assistant on Mike Boynton's staff at Michigan, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Ranking top coaches: Can Curt Cignetti win this ti...
items.detail: Our reporters make -- and defend -- their picks for the coaches they'd want to lead their team.

items.headline: 2026 WNBA championship odds: Lynx remain on top; V...
items.detail: Entering the week at 17-7, the Golden State Valkyries now have the fourth-shortest odds to win the WNBA title.

items.headline: Prospects watch: The future is not quite now
items.detail: Eric Karabell reports from the MLB draft and Futures Game to let fantasy managers know whose names you need to know.

items.headline: Ohtani, Witt and ... Pete Alonso! First-half MVPs ...
items.detail: We name each club's top performer so far -- and how many All-Stars they'd have in a perfect world.

items.headline: From unranked in high school to summer league stan...
items.detail: Once overlooked as recruits, these summer league rookies are proving why they were first-round draft picks.

items.headline: NBA summer league: First impressions of rookies an...
items.detail: 2026 summer league is in full swing! Our NBA insiders break down first impressions of top rookie debuts.

items.headline: Police investigation of Jets' Smith no longer acti...
items.detail: An investigation of Geno Smith for an incident in which a woman accused him of battery last month is no longer active, and the New York Jets quarterback will not be charged.

items.headline: Rams' Jackson won't face felony charge for arrest
items.detail: The Rams' Alaric Jackson will not face a felony charge after he was arrested on a domestic violence charge in June, the Los Angeles County District Attorney's Office confirmed to ESPN.

items.headline: Packers sign LB McDuffie to one-year extension
items.detail: The Packers signed veteran linebacker Isaiah McDuffie to a contract extension Monday.

items.headline: Free agent Diggs: No WR2 in NFL better than me
items.detail: Free agent Stefon Diggs says he is better than any No. 2 wide receiver currently on an NFL roster.

items.headline: Niners part owner agrees to purchase Seahawks
items.detail: A group led by Niners limited partner Vinod Khosla has agreed to purchase the Seahawks, with sources telling ESPN the selling price will be a record $9.612 billion. The Khosla family will be required to divest its interest in the 49ers.

items.headline: No GPS tracker for Arnold, can work out for teams
items.detail: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold does not need to wear a GPS tracker as a condition of his release, a Florida judge ruled Friday, allowing him to continue to work out with NFL teams in an effort to get re-signed after being cut.

items.headline: Study: NFLers die from dementia at higher rate
items.detail: NFL players are four times more likely than the general population to die of neurodegenerative diseases such as dementia and Parkinson's, according to a study released Wednesday.

items.headline: Commanders to retire No. 44 of HOF RB Riggins
items.detail: The Commanders are retiring the No. 44 worn by Hall of Famer and franchise rushing leader John Riggins -- more than 40 years after one of the most famous runs in Super Bowl history.

items.headline: 🏈 Meet the family set to buy the Seahawks
items.detail: Vinod Khosla is a prominent venture capitalist, and his wife, Neeru, is an education philanthropist.
